title: Null operationName API request break

posts.author: artushin (artushin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The Monday API broke yesterday (Aug 6th) by no longer accepting null as a valid operationName. null is valid as per GraphQL Over HTTP.

Additional context - this breaks n8n integration: GraphQL Node Suddenly Returning Errors for Monday.com Queries - #4 by Dawson_Sewell - Questions - n8n Community

What are you trying to achieve

Stable API integration
